base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of boss_death_effect_big — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 castlevania. multiple flash-bursts across the boss's hitbox, expanding outward, then fade. Triggers 'stage clear' sequence. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 8-frame large boss-death explosion — multiple flash-bursts across the boss's hitbox, expanding outward, then fade. Triggers 'stage clear' sequence
